title: Code 01 Bad Girl
body: Code#01 Bad Girl (Korean: Code#01 나쁜여자) is the debut extended play by South Korean girl group Ladies' Code. It was released on March 7, 2013 through Polaris Entertainment and CJ E&M Music. Its lead single "Bad Girl" was released the same day.
categories: Album articles lacking alt text for covers
